goal: Nightly evolution defaults to a non-mutating dry-run that records requested phases as planned.
narrative: An operator previews the private local nightly chain before allowing any agent work to run.
expected_outcome: The digest is written, mode is dry-run, requested Dream and evolve phases are marked planned, and neither the Dream start command nor the evolve supervisor is invoked.

acceptance_vectors.check: bats tests/scripts/nightly-evolution.bats --filter 'dry-run with requested phases records planned without executing'
digest.json includes mode and phase statuses
